ranked_movies.title: Hereditary
ranked_movies.reason: Extensively discussed and praised for its performances, particularly Toni Collette's, and frequently cited as a benchmark for modern horror that leaves a lasting impact.

ranked_movies.title: The Thing
ranked_movies.reason: Consistently mentioned as a top favorite for its practical effects, body horror, and iconic scenes; a cornerstone of the genre.

ranked_movies.title: Alien
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently listed as a top horror and sci-fi hybrid, praised for its monster design and atmosphere.

ranked_movies.title: The Shining
ranked_movies.reason: Often cited for its iconic performances and psychological horror, with Shelley Duvall's role specifically mentioned as Oscar-worthy.

ranked_movies.title: The Exorcist
ranked_movies.reason: A classic frequently appearing in top 5 lists and discussions about foundational horror films.

ranked_movies.title: Scream
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a favorite franchise and a smart, self-aware slasher that fans enjoy for its rules and humor.

ranked_movies.title: The Ring
ranked_movies.reason: Discussed in the context of villain motives and frequently recommended as a terrifying and impactful film.

ranked_movies.title: Candyman
ranked_movies.reason: Praised for Tony Todd's performance and its sympathetic villain, often listed in top horror movies.

ranked_movies.title: Midsommar
ranked_movies.reason: Cited for its unique atmosphere and its ability to influence viewers' perspectives, even inspiring an appreciation for its depicted lifestyle.

ranked_movies.title: The Conjuring
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned in top 5 lists and as a modern horror staple, though also the subject of complaints about theater etiquette.

ranked_movies.title: Terrifier
ranked_movies.reason: Extensively discussed due to the controversy of parents bringing children to see its extreme violence, making it a hot topic.

ranked_movies.title: Event Horizon
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended as a must-see horror film and often described as the unofficial prequel to Warhammer 40k.

ranked_movies.title: The Autopsy of Jane Doe
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently recommended as an underrated gem and a top-tier horror movie.

ranked_movies.title: Silence of the Lambs
ranked_movies.reason: Often listed in top horror films and praised for its Oscar-worthy performances.

ranked_movies.title: Carrie
ranked_movies.reason: Discussed as a film where the villain has a valid grievance and frequently mentioned in top horror lists.

ranked_movies.title: Hellraiser
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned in the context of body horror and as a classic that needs a modern remake; the Lament Configuration was a central joke in a popular post.

ranked_movies.title: Jaws
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a film that changed behavior (fear of water) and frequently listed as a top horror favorite.

ranked_movies.title: The Fly
ranked_movies.reason: Praised for Jeff Goldblum's performance and its body horror, often mentioned as a brilliant horror film.

ranked_movies.title: REC
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently recommended, especially for found footage fans, and praised for its intense stairwell scene.

ranked_movies.title: The Substance
ranked_movies.reason: A recent film highly discussed for its wild finale and Demi Moore's performance, often compared to other body horror classics.
